subject: Enhancing The Streetwear Studio's Garment Production
body:
Hi Ben,

We've been impressed by The Streetwear Studio's presence in the UK streetwear scene, offering both in-store and delivery options for your customers. We understand the unique demands of the streetwear market and believe we can be a valuable partner in your continued growth.

We are at Bassi Clothing, a direct garment manufacturer with extensive experience in the UK and European markets. Our focus is on delivering premium quality garments with reliable logistics, a combination we believe would significantly benefit a brand like The Streetwear Studio as you expand your collections.

Many brands face challenges with long lead times (often 6-8 weeks from the Far East), high MOQs that stifle flexibility, and frustrating quality inconsistencies across production batches. We solve these common pain points by offering:

• MOQ as low as 300 pieces per style

• 90-100 day production turnaround

• SEDEX 4 Pillar certified factory by SETMA, Zedd silver certification

• Direct manufacturer - no middlemen markup

Given The Streetwear Studio's focus, we believe these products from our catalog would be particularly relevant for your brand:

• Heavyweight Hoodie - MOQ 300 pcs, $8.00-12.00 FOB, crafted from premium brushed fleece or French terry for ultimate comfort and durability

• Crewneck Sweatshirt - MOQ 300 pcs, $7.00-10.00 FOB, featuring versatile French Terry or cozy Fleece options

• Premium Cotton T-Shirt - MOQ 500 pcs, $4.00-6.00 FOB, available in 100% cotton or organic cotton options for a soft feel

• Track Pants & Joggers - MOQ 500 pcs, $5.00-8.00 FOB, perfect for completing any streetwear ensemble with comfort and style

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples - no commitment.

subject: Exploring manufacturing partnership for Viggo's luxury collections
body:
Hi Marin,

We've been impressed by Viggo's presence in luxury fashion, especially with your focus on both in-store experiences and efficient delivery, catering to a discerning clientele.

We are at Bassi Clothing, a direct manufacturer specializing in premium garment production and reliable delivery across the UK and EU. We believe our commitment to quality and ethical manufacturing aligns perfectly with the sophisticated standards Viggo upholds.

Many brands face challenges with long lead times (often 6-8 weeks from the Far East), high MOQs that stifle flexibility, and frustrating quality inconsistency across production batches. We solve these critical pain points by offering:

• MOQ as low as 300 pieces per style

• A structured 90-100 day production turnaround with consistent quality

• A SEDEX 4 Pillar certified factory, thoroughly audited by SETMA, alongside Zedd silver certification for ethical and compliant manufacturing

• As a direct manufacturer, we eliminate middlemen markups, ensuring competitive pricing and transparent processes.

Given Viggo's emphasis on luxury fashion, we believe these products from our catalog could be particularly relevant for your brand:

• Classic Polo Shirt - MOQ 500 pieces, $5.50-7.50 FOB, crafted from premium Pique Cotton or Cotton-Elastane Blend for a refined feel.

• Premium Cotton T-Shirt - MOQ 500 pieces, $4.00-6.00 FOB, offering exceptional comfort and durability with 100% Cotton or Organic Cotton options.

• Heavyweight Hoodie - MOQ 300 pieces, $8.00-12.00 FOB, ideal for luxury casual lines with options like Brushed Fleece and French Terry.

• Crewneck Sweatshirt - MOQ 300 pieces, $7.00-10.00 FOB, perfect for elevated comfort wear, available in French Terry or high-quality Fleece.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples - no commitment.

subject: Enhancing MURMUR's Collections with Premium EU/UK Manufacturing
body:
Hi Andreea,

We've been deeply impressed by MURMUR's unique vision of celebrating femininity, strength, and sensuality through your reinterpretations of retro lingerie and couture silhouettes. Your focus on inspiring confidence through clothing that blends elegance with modern aesthetics truly stands out.

At Bassi Clothing, we are a direct manufacturer specializing in premium quality garment production with reliable EU/UK delivery, and we believe our capabilities align perfectly with MURMUR's commitment to exceptional design and quality. We understand the importance of a manufacturing partner who can consistently deliver on your distinct aesthetic.

Many brands face challenges with long lead times (often 6-8 weeks from the Far East), high MOQs that stifle flexibility, and inconsistent quality across production batches. We solve these critical pain points by offering:

• MOQ as low as 300 pieces per style

• 90-100 day production turnaround with consistent quality

• SEDEX 4 Pillar certified factory audited by SETMA, and Zedd silver certification for ethical and compliant manufacturing

• Direct manufacturer - meaning zero middlemen markup and transparent pricing

Given MURMUR's sophisticated approach to contemporary fashion, we believe these products from our catalog could be a strong fit for your collections:

• Premium Cotton T-Shirt - MOQ 500 pieces, $4.00-6.00 FOB, crafted from 100% (180 GSM) or organic (160 GSM) cotton with GOTS and Oeko-Tex Standard 100 certifications.

• Organic Essential Tee - MOQ 300 pieces, $5.00-7.00 FOB, made from GOTS Certified Organic Cotton (180 GSM), ideal for high-quality, sustainable base layers.

• Heavyweight Hoodie - MOQ 300 pieces, $8.00-12.00 FOB, available in brushed fleece (320 GSM) or French terry (280 GSM), perfect for elevated casualwear.

• Crewneck Sweatshirt - MOQ 300 pieces, $7.00-10.00 FOB, offered in French terry (280 GSM) or fleece (350 GSM), combining comfort with a refined finish.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples - no commitment.

subject: Liquor Store × Bassi Clothing — Reliable Garment Manufacturing for United Kingdom
body:
Hi nan,

I came across Liquor Store and was impressed by your brand's approach to fashion in the United Kingdom market.

Many brands like yours face challenges with long lead times (6-8 weeks from the Far East), high MOQs, and inconsistent quality across batches. We solve all three:

• MOQ as low as 300 pieces per style

• 90-100 day production turnaround

• SEDEX 4 Pillar certified factory by SETMA, Zedd silver certification

• Direct manufacturer — no middlemen markup

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.
